evals.name: full-review
evals.prompt: Check if the openinference-core docs are up to date with the source code
evals.expected_output: A report of any discrepancies between docs/ and src/, or confirmation that docs are accurate

evals.name: targeted-review
evals.prompt: I modified some types in openinference-core's trace-config module. Can you make sure the docs still match?
evals.expected_output: Focused review of trace-config-and-masking.md against the trace-config source files, reporting any drift

evals.name: export-gaps
evals.prompt: What's documented vs what's actually exported from @arizeai/openinference-core? Are there any gaps?
evals.expected_output: A comparison of documented exports in docs/README.md against actual barrel file exports, flagging any missing or extra entries
